item.name: Authentic Grilled Corn
item.description:
Sweet millioncorn on the cob, basted with authentic Hingan soy sauce and broiled over an open flame. So succulently delicious, you won't want to miss a kernel.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Critical Hit Bonus: +4% (Max 10)
VIT Bonus: +5% (Max 12)
Gear Durability Bonus: +3
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
